channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Food refuse on pavement, 22nd June
item.description:
Today household rubbish containing food stroon across the pavement- foxes in the area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mount Pleasant Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-Tip against school fence, 22nd June
item.description:
Fridge and furniture dumped against Willowbank School fence
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Seacourt Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car with flat tyres, 22nd June
item.description:
Car abandoned on driveway. Originally moved off main road while waiting for AA. Been left for a couple of days. AA confirms there was no call out for the car

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 22nd June
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: The person trimming the grass in front of Waldron House cut down the Agapanthus!, 22nd June
item.description:
We had beautiful agapanthus plants about to flower in front of Waldron House and today the person using the strimmer to cut the grass also cut down these beautiful flowers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton Water Lane, Brixton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags and other rubbish round tree, 22nd June
item.description:
Rubbish frequently dumped at this tree.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blandford Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes overgrown on path way!, 22nd June
item.description:
All the bushes on the path way and up the road on the left handier are all overgrown. Can’t walk up the path and if a wheelchair user or someone with a pram walks past they are confined to use a small side and driving up the road cars keep getting scratched. Please can you cut back the bushes on both the road and path behind the flats. This is not for Clarion Housing. LBB own the land. LBB responsibility.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Duddington Close, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found, 22nd June
item.description:
A Fly-tip Large - More than 10 black bags problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chatsworth Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: No. 40/42 and no. 27, 22nd June
item.description:
This is a recent development and is quite deep. It appears to be getting worse. We have very heavy lorries arriving on a regular basis up and down the road as two major works have been taking place. Please assess as there could be imminent collapse if a heavy lorry drives over it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Crediton Hill, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charles Square, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pitfield Street, Hackney, London

item.title: I found that somone had dumped this outside my house this morning as I left home., 22nd June
item.description:
Fly tipping Somone has dumped this outside my house, found as I left home this morning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queen's Mead Road, Shortlands, Greater London

item.description:
This area needs a proper deep clean

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pitfield Street, Hackney, London

item.title: Huge pile of fly tipped trees, bags, garden waste, mattress, rubble etc, 22nd June
item.description:
Big and growing pile of fly tipped rubbish approx 5 metres long by 1.5 metres high
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dowanhill Road, Catford South, Greater London

item.title: Significant litter along KPR, Southwark side, 22nd June
item.description:
Lots of litter following cricket matches and bin collection today. A thorough sweep is needed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Waterloo passage and burton roaf, 22nd June
item.description:
Mattress etc dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn High Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Cambridge Avenue on south side of the street walking down towards the tube station from Kilburn high Road, 22nd June
item.description:
There is lots of graffiti that needs cleaning on the walls and houses on the left as you go down Cambridge Avenue towards the tube station from Kilburn high Road. There is also graffiti on street furniture and infrastructure in multiple places of penises. This is an eyesore to the area and must be cleaned Asap. If deemed private property you must fine the owner accordingly.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In front of burnt out building at top of Cambridge Avenue near kilburn high road, 22nd June
item.description:
Loads of litter has been left in front of the burnt out building on Cambridge Avenue. Mostly cans bottles etc. there are hundreds of them. Please can you clean this up ASAP as it is a massive eyesore on the area. If deemed private property you must fine the owner.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cambridge Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street cleaning - Grass verges / Shrub beds - Littering
